ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Recent Account Activity
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a transaction on your account on 07 Apr 2026 at 14:32:00 UTC. Amount: Rs. 5,000.00.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at 1800-XXX-XXX or visit <URL> to secure your account.

Thank you for banking with XYZ Bank.

Regards,
XYZ Bank Security Team

spam.subject: Important: Your Scholarship Award Pending Verification
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the 2026 Excellence Scholarship offered by the prestigious National Institute of Technology.

To confirm your award, we need to verify your details. Please submit your full name, date of birth, student ID, and a copy of your passport by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to verify within 48 hours will result in forfeiture of the scholarship.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
Scholarship Committee
National Institute of Technology
